description: The model answered a count or list from memory instead of a current tool result.
body: Failure: a deterministic count, row total, file list, or matching item count was generated from model text or stale context. Impact: the answer may vary across model routes and cannot be reproduced. Do not use: do not present counts as verified without a command/query/source scope. Recovery: run a read-only query or mark the answer unverified.. Use when a query task is answered from memory, stale context, or an unbounded dump instead of source evidence. Do not use this dossier as a positive implementation strategy; it is a do-not-use signal. Actions: rerun the read-only query, cite the exact source, narrow the output, and verify the working tree stayed unchanged. Validation signals include command output, file references, count checks, and no edit/diff evidence. Risk boundary: block closure when the request was mutated into a write task or when sensitive data would be exposed.
